coupon.source_phrase_block: 308 Congress St., Boston, MA, 02210 Map 617-426-6500 Each pass admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person. Library Coupons are not valid for Sunday afternoons (Admission is $1 per person on Sundays from 1:30 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.). This pass is valid only on the date printed on the pass. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
